chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1439 of 2023 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6095/2023 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case 08.09.2025 ************** 1. Deferred for the time being. 2. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Same was the position on the last date of hearing, i.e., 04.10.2023. The record reflects that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing the matter. Accordingly, the present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
